name: Grok-4
archDisplay: Mixture-of-Experts (size undisclosed; RL-trained at pretraining scale on Colossus, ~200K H100s)
note: Native tool-use reasoning flagship; led ARC-AGI-2 at launch. Official model card published by xAI (data.x.ai). Deprecated in the May 15, 2026 retirement wave, redirects to Grok 4.3.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real: launched July 9, 2025 via livestream (Teslarati, TechCrunch, etc.), official model card exists at data.x.ai/2025-08-20-grok-4-model-card.pdf. GPQA 87.5, AIME 91.7, and LiveCodeBench 79 confirmed literally present on datacamp.com/blog/grok-4 via direct fetch. HLE 25.4 confirmed literally on scientificamerican.com ('scored 25.4 percent'). CORRECTED the ARC-AGI-2 sourceUrl: the original x.com/xai tweet URL returned HTTP 402 (paywalled, unfetchable); replaced with introl.com, which was fetched directly and literally contains '15.9%' attributed to Grok 4 Thinking mode on ARC-AGI-2 — independently corroborated by ARC Prize Foundation's own announcement (x.com/arcprize) and multiple outlets (Built In, Teslarati). Context window 256K and pricing $3/$15 confirmed independently. 200K H100 Colossus claim confirmed via xAI/NVIDIA/Tom's Hardware coverage.
